aeo_readiness.summary: The business has some foundational elements for AEO readiness but lacks critical optimizations in content, reviews, and local SEO.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews to the website and Google Business Profile to build trust and improve local SEO.
Optimize website content with targeted keywords related to HVAC services in NYC, Bronx, Westchester, and Connecticut.
Implement a blog section to regularly publish relevant content about HVAC services, energy efficiency, and indoor air quality.

gbp_analysis.summary: No Google Business Profile (GBP) was found for Tribeca Air Conditioning Corp. This is a critical gap for local search visibility.
critical_issues: Missing Google Business Profile, which is essential for local search visibility and customer engagement.
Lack of customer reviews and ratings, which are crucial for building trust and improving search rankings.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or incomplete Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web, which affects local SEO.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories, including Google, Yelp, and local business listings.
Claim and verify business listings on major directories and platforms to improve local search presence.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and ratings
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers searching for HVAC services in NYC
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Setting up a Google Business Profile and actively managing customer reviews
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publishing high-quality, keyword-rich content on the website and leveraging schema markup for better search engine understanding
